We are driving this growth by focusing on four key areas, making our service better, bringing Airbnb to more parts of the world, expanding what we offer, and integrating AI across our app. So what I want to do is I want to share just a few highlights on each of these four growth levers. First, we're making Airbnb better for our hosts and guests. So we know that the better our product is, the more people use it. And since this past May, We didn't stop. In fact, we accelerated development by making 65 major improvements that we think will help further drive growth. And here are just a few of them. You know, we know that guests want more flexibility in ways that they can pay. So we introduced reserve now, pay later in the United States. And not unexpectedly, this helped drive nice since he's booked in Q3. So we're going to continue to roll this out more broadly next year. We also announced improved maps.
